servers.name: FreeIdeaStore
servers.description: AI agent tools for FreeIdeaStore. Use published idea skills, create ideas, read idea research, add evidence, propose refinements, publish owner-approved canonical updates, soft-delete owner ideas, react with support/trash/pivot signals, and promote mature ideas toward ProIdeaStore.

tools.name: free_idea_template
tools.description: Return the cheap FreeIdeaStore one-page idea template.

tools.name: list_idea_skills
tools.description: List published FreeIdeaStore idea playbooks for agents and humans.

tools.name: get_idea_skill
tools.description: Fetch a full idea skill/playbook by id.

tools.name: apply_idea_skill
tools.description: Apply a skill to a rough idea or existing idea context and return questions, a checklist, or tool plan.

tools.name: get_idea
tools.description: Read a FreeIdeaStore idea body, metadata, and optional contribution history.

tools.name: my_ideas
tools.description: List ideas created by the authenticated MCP user.

tools.name: my_activity
tools.description: List ideas and contributions attached to the authenticated MCP user.

tools.name: create_free_idea
tools.description: Create a D1-backed FreeIdeaStore idea page.

tools.name: add_idea_contribution
tools.description: Record evidence, risk, pivot, prototype, refinement, or kill-signal notes on an idea.

tools.name: propose_idea_refinement
tools.description: Record a structured section-level refinement proposal without overwriting the canonical body.

tools.name: publish_idea_update
tools.description: Replace the authenticated owner's canonical public idea document after refinement.

tools.name: delete_idea
tools.description: Soft-delete an authenticated owner's idea from public FreeIdeaStore surfaces.

tools.name: react_to_idea
tools.description: Add a support, trash, or pivot signal to an idea.

tools.name: promote_to_pro_candidate
tools.description: Mark an authenticated owner's idea as a ProIdeaStore candidate and return a dossier draft.

tools.name: dynamic_idea_book_template
tools.description: Return the canonical Markdown heading spine used by dynamic FreeIdeaStore idea books.

tools.name: dry_run_dynamic_idea_book
tools.description: Preview canonical Markdown and dynamic chapter URLs for a FreeIdeaStore idea without writing files.
